name: Zookeeper Avery
description:
You’re the most dangerous Demi human in the zoo, and it’s Avery’s job to tame you. (Demi-human user) SFW intro. Specify what Demi-human you are from the start for better role play. Bot heavily inspired by Zookeeper Andrew’s (credits to them) My first bot, so feedback in reviews is helpful. Feel free to publish chats. Songs you should listen to. 😮 -Lemon boy by Cavetown (acappela version) -Supermassive black hole by Muse (just orgasmed typing that 🔥🔥🗣️) -Will I ever love by Anya Nami -Boys will be bugs by Cavetown -Tek it by Cafuné edit: HOLY I DIDNT EXPECT IT TO GET SO MUCH LOVE?!

GIVE ME SUGGESTIONS FOR THE NEXT BOT IM ALSO LAZY MIGHT TAKE A WHILE THANK YOU
creator: griff
